owner: Category Team (data-agent acting); Product approves, QA verifies

shelf_map.mapping_rationale: Shufersal's 'דגני בוקר' (breakfast cereals) shelf is the canonical bowl-and-milk cereal aisle: cornflakes, whole-grain flakes, muesli, granola (boxed/bagged), puffed rice/wheat, oat-based cold cereals, and children's character cereals. This is the editorial scope of the breakfast-cereals category.

explicitly_out_of_scope.item: granola/cereal BARS (חטיף גרנולה / חטיף דגנים / bar)
explicitly_out_of_scope.reason: belongs to snack_bars category — eaten as a handheld snack, not a bowl-and-milk cereal. Prevents corpus overlap (see corpus_filter.json).

explicitly_out_of_scope.item: hot porridge / דייסה / קוואקר חם instant porridge sachets
explicitly_out_of_scope.reason: borderline; cold ready-to-eat cereals are the v2 scope. Instant hot porridge deferred to avoid serving-context mixing. Plain rolled oats (שיבולת שועל) admitted as oat_cold_cereal only when sold as cereal, not as a baking ingredient.
cracker/crispbread archetype, separate aisle and serving role.
Constitution Art. II Sec 2.3 absolute restriction (medical/infant nutrition) — not ranked at all.

duplicate_shelf_check: PASS — no other active Bari category claims the 'דגני בוקר' shelf. snack_bars owns חטיף aisle; the bar/cereal boundary is enforced in corpus_filter.json.
